title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 2026
summary: France's July 1 PSAN-to-MiCA transition deadline forces 150+ crypto firms to submit full authorization applications while AMLA launches Q3 with direct supervision over highest-risk CASPs across all 27 EU member states—creating a 90-day compliance sprint where every registered crypto firm, bank with digital asset exposure, and payment processor needs transaction monitoring, travel rule infrastructure, and market abuse detection systems operational before September.
